grammar_points.name: 助动词"要" (Auxiliary Verb 要)
grammar_points.explanation: 用在动词前，表示有做某件事情的愿望。When used before a verb, it indicates the desire to do something. 否定形式一般为"不想" (The negative form is usually 不想).

examples.chinese: 王方要学习英语。", "pinyin": "Wáng Fāng yào xuéxí Yīngyǔ.", "english": "Wang Fang wants to study English.
我要吃米饭。", "pinyin": "Wǒ yào chī mǐfàn.", "english": "I want to eat rice.
我不想去。", "pinyin": "Wǒ bù xiǎng qù.", "english": "I don't want to go.

grammar_points.name: 程度副词"最" (Adverb of Degree 最)
grammar_points.explanation: 表示在同类事物中或某方面占第一位。It means being the first among things of the same kind or in a certain aspect.

examples.chinese: 大卫的汉语最好。", "pinyin": "Dàwèi de Hànyǔ zuì hǎo.", "english": "David's Chinese is the best.
我最喜欢吃米饭。", "pinyin": "Wǒ zuì xǐhuan chī mǐfàn.", "english": "I like eating rice the most.
它的眼睛最漂亮。", "pinyin": "Tā de yǎnjing zuì piàoliang.", "english": "Its eyes are the most beautiful.

grammar_points.name: 概数的表达: 几、多 (Approximate Numbers with 几 and 多)
grammar_points.explanation: 几表示10以内的不定个数，后边要有量词。多表示超过某数量。几 indicates an indefinite number less than 10, followed by a measure word. 多 indicates exceeding a certain quantity.

examples.chinese: 车上有几个人。", "pinyin": "Chē shang yǒu jǐ ge rén.", "english": "There are a few people on the bus.
我想买几本书。", "pinyin": "Wǒ xiǎng mǎi jǐ běn shū.", "english": "I want to buy a few books.
五十多个人", "pinyin": "wǔshí duō ge rén", "english": "more than fifty people

grammar_points.name: 时间状语 (Time Adverbials)
grammar_points.explanation: 时间词作状语时，既可以在主语前，也可以在主语后。When a time word serves as an adverbial, it can come either before or after the subject.

examples.chinese: 我每天六点起床。", "pinyin": "Wǒ měitiān liù diǎn qǐchuáng.", "english": "I get up at six every day.
明天我们去上海。", "pinyin": "Míngtiān wǒmen qù Shànghǎi.", "english": "Tomorrow we're going to Shanghai.
昨天我没有去上课。", "pinyin": "Zuótiān wǒ méiyǒu qù shàngkè.", "english": "Yesterday I didn't go to class.

grammar_points.name: 介词"跟" (Preposition 跟)
grammar_points.explanation: 跟引进动作的对象，相当于"和"。跟 introduces the object of an action, similar to 和 (with).

examples.chinese: 我跟朋友一起去。", "pinyin": "Wǒ gēn péngyou yīqǐ qù.", "english": "I'm going with my friend.
你跟谁说话？", "pinyin": "Nǐ gēn shéi shuōhuà?", "english": "Who are you talking to?
我想跟你学习汉语。", "pinyin": "Wǒ xiǎng gēn nǐ xuéxí Hànyǔ.", "english": "I want to study Chinese with you.

grammar_points.name: 介词"给" (Preposition 给)
grammar_points.explanation: 给引进动作的接受者。给 introduces the recipient of an action.

examples.chinese: 我给妈妈打电话。", "pinyin": "Wǒ gěi māma dǎ diànhuà.", "english": "I'll call my mother.
他给我买了一个礼物。", "pinyin": "Tā gěi wǒ mǎi le yí ge lǐwù.", "english": "He bought me a gift.

grammar_points.name: 疑问代词"怎么" (Interrogative Pronoun 怎么)
grammar_points.explanation: 怎么询问动作的方式或方法。怎么 asks about the manner or method of an action.

examples.chinese: 你怎么去公司？", "pinyin": "Nǐ zěnme qù gōngsī?", "english": "How do you go to the company?
这个词怎么读？", "pinyin": "Zhège cí zěnme dú?", "english": "How do you read this word?

grammar_points.name: 量词的重叠 (Reduplication of Measure Words)
grammar_points.explanation: 量词重叠表示"每一"的意思。When a measure word is reduplicated, it means 'every'.

examples.chinese: 人人都要学习。", "pinyin": "Rénrén dōu yào xuéxí.", "english": "Everyone needs to study.
他天天来。", "pinyin": "Tā tiāntiān lái.", "english": "He comes every day.
个个都喜欢。", "pinyin": "Gège dōu xǐhuan.", "english": "Everyone likes it.

grammar_points.name: 关联词"因为…所以…" (The Pair of Conjunctions 因为…所以…)
grammar_points.explanation: 因为…所以…表示因果关系。因为…所以… indicates a cause-effect relationship.

examples.chinese: 因为下雨，所以我不去。", "pinyin": "Yīnwèi xiàyǔ, suǒyǐ wǒ bú qù.", "english": "Because it's raining, I'm not going.
因为他很忙，所以没时间。", "pinyin": "Yīnwèi tā hěn máng, suǒyǐ méi shíjiān.", "english": "Because he's busy, he has no time.

grammar_points.name: 语气副词"还"(2) (Modal Adverb 还(2))
grammar_points.explanation: 还表示除此之外，另有补充。还 indicates addition, meaning 'also' or 'in addition'.

examples.chinese: 他还会说日语。", "pinyin": "Tā hái huì shuō Rìyǔ.", "english": "He can also speak Japanese.
我还有一个问题。", "pinyin": "Wǒ hái yǒu yí ge wèntí.", "english": "I have one more question.

grammar_points.name: 时间副词"就" (Adverb of Time 就)
grammar_points.explanation: 就表示事情发生得早或快。就 indicates that something happened early or quickly.

examples.chinese: 我八点就来了。", "pinyin": "Wǒ bā diǎn jiù lái le.", "english": "I came as early as eight o'clock.
他很快就回来了。", "pinyin": "Tā hěn kuài jiù huílái le.", "english": "He'll be back very soon.

grammar_points.name: 动词"过" (The Verb 过)
grammar_points.explanation: 过表示经过某个地点。过 indicates passing through a location.

examples.chinese: 我每天路过那个商店。", "pinyin": "Wǒ měitiān lùguò nàge shāngdiàn.", "english": "I pass by that store every day.
你走过那座桥吗？", "pinyin": "Nǐ zǒuguò nà zuò qiáo ma?", "english": "Have you walked across that bridge?

grammar_points.name: 语气助词"呢" (Modal Particle 呢)
grammar_points.explanation: 呢用在特指问句后，表示疑问语气。呢 is used at the end of special questions to indicate an interrogative tone.

examples.chinese: 他在哪儿呢？", "pinyin": "Tā zài nǎr ne?", "english": "Where is he?
你吃什么呢？", "pinyin": "Nǐ chī shénme ne?", "english": "What are you eating?

grammar_points.name: 疑问句"…，好吗？" (Interrogative Sentence …，好吗？)
grammar_points.explanation: 好吗用在陈述句后，表示征求对方意见。好吗 is added after a statement to ask for agreement.

examples.chinese: 我们一起去，好吗？", "pinyin": "Wǒmen yīqǐ qù, hǎo ma?", "english": "Let's go together, okay?
你帮我，好吗？", "pinyin": "Nǐ bāng wǒ, hǎo ma?", "english": "Will you help me, okay?

grammar_points.name: 副词"再" (The Adverb 再)
grammar_points.explanation: 再表示一个动作或状态将在下个时间发生或重复。再 indicates an action will happen or repeat in the future.

examples.chinese: 我明天再来。", "pinyin": "Wǒ míngtiān zài lái.", "english": "I'll come again tomorrow.
让我想想再说。", "pinyin": "Ràng wǒ xiǎngxiang zài shuō.", "english": "Let me think before I speak.
再见！", "pinyin": "Zàijiàn!", "english": "See you again!

grammar_points.name: 兼语句 (Pivotal Sentences)
grammar_points.explanation: 兼语句中，前一个动词的宾语同时是后一个动词的主语。In a pivotal sentence, the object of the first verb is also the subject of the second verb.

examples.chinese: 让我想想。", "pinyin": "Ràng wǒ xiǎngxiang.", "english": "Let me think.
请你说慢一点。", "pinyin": "Qǐng nǐ shuō màn yīdiǎn.", "english": "Please speak slower.
老师让我们学习。", "pinyin": "Lǎoshī ràng wǒmen xuéxí.", "english": "The teacher let us study.

grammar_points.name: 动词的重叠 (Reduplication of Verbs)
grammar_points.explanation: 单音节动词重叠表示动作时间短或尝试。Reduplication of single-syllable verbs indicates brief or trial action.

examples.chinese: 我想想。", "pinyin": "Wǒ xiǎngxiang.", "english": "Let me think.
你看看。", "pinyin": "Nǐ kànkan.", "english": "Take a look.
我试试这件衣服。", "pinyin": "Wǒ shìshi zhè jiàn yīfu.", "english": "Let me try on this clothes.

grammar_points.name: 结果补语 (Complements of Result)
grammar_points.explanation: 结果补语表示动作的结果。常用的有：完、到、见、好等。A result complement indicates the result of an action. Common ones include: 完 (finished), 到 (obtained), 见 (perceived), 好 (done well).

examples.chinese: 我做完了作业。", "pinyin": "Wǒ zuòwán le zuòyè.", "english": "I finished my homework.
我买到了一本书。", "pinyin": "Wǒ mǎidào le yì běn shū.", "english": "I bought a book.
我看见了他。", "pinyin": "Wǒ kànjiàn le tā.", "english": "I saw him.
饭做好了。", "pinyin": "Fàn zuòhǎo le.", "english": "The food is ready.

grammar_points.name: 介词"从" (Preposition 从)
grammar_points.explanation: 从表示时间或空间的起点。从 indicates the starting point in time or space.

examples.chinese: 我从北京来。", "pinyin": "Wǒ cóng Běijīng lái.", "english": "I come from Beijing.
从九点到十点。", "pinyin": "Cóng jiǔ diǎn dào shí diǎn.", "english": "From nine to ten.
从今天开始。", "pinyin": "Cóng jīntiān kāishǐ.", "english": "Starting from today.

grammar_points.name: "第~"表示顺序 (第~ Indicating Order)
grammar_points.explanation: 第加数词表示顺序。第 plus a number indicates order.

examples.chinese: 第一课", "pinyin": "dì yī kè", "english": "Lesson 1
我是第二名。", "pinyin": "Wǒ shì dì èr míng.", "english": "I'm in second place.
第一次", "pinyin": "dì yī cì", "english": "the first time

grammar_points.name: 祈使句: 不要…了 (Imperative Sentence: 不要…了)
grammar_points.explanation: 不要表示禁止或劝阻，了表示变化。不要 indicates prohibition or dissuasion, and 了 indicates change.

examples.chinese: 不要找了。", "pinyin": "Búyào zhǎo le.", "english": "Stop looking.
不要哭了。", "pinyin": "Búyào kū le.", "english": "Don't cry anymore.
不要说了。", "pinyin": "Búyào shuō le.", "english": "Stop talking.

grammar_points.name: 动态助词"了" (Aspect Particle 了)
grammar_points.explanation: 了表示动作完成或状态变化。了 indicates completion of an action or change of state.

examples.chinese: 我买了一个手机。", "pinyin": "Wǒ mǎi le yí ge shǒujī.", "english": "I bought a phone.
下雨了。", "pinyin": "Xià yǔ le.", "english": "It's raining now.
他走了。", "pinyin": "Tā zǒu le.", "english": "He left.

grammar_points.name: 介词"对" (Preposition 对)
grammar_points.explanation: 对引进动作的对象。对 introduces the target or object of an action.

examples.chinese: 他对我说。", "pinyin": "Tā duì wǒ shuō.", "english": "He said to me.
他对汉语很感兴趣。", "pinyin": "Tā duì Hànyǔ hěn gǎn xìngqù.", "english": "He's very interested in Chinese.
这个问题对他来说很难。", "pinyin": "Zhège wèntí duì tā lái shuō hěn nán.", "english": "This question is very hard for him.

grammar_points.name: 动词结构做定语 (Verb Structure as Attributive Modifier)
grammar_points.explanation: 动词或动词结构可以作定语修饰名词。A verb or verb phrase can serve as an attributive modifier for a noun.

examples.chinese: 买书的人", "pinyin": "mǎi shū de rén", "english": "the person buying books
学习汉语的方法", "pinyin": "xuéxí Hànyǔ de fāngfǎ", "english": "the method of learning Chinese
来中国的朋友", "pinyin": "lái Zhōngguó de péngyou", "english": "the friend coming to China

grammar_points.name: "比"字句(1) (The 比 Sentence (1))
grammar_points.explanation: 比字句用于比较，基本结构是A比B + 形容词。比 sentence is used for comparison, basic structure is A比B + adjective.

examples.chinese: 他比我大。", "pinyin": "Tā bǐ wǒ dà.", "english": "He is older than me.
今天比昨天冷。", "pinyin": "Jīntiān bǐ zuótiān lěng.", "english": "Today is colder than yesterday.
他比我大三岁。", "pinyin": "Tā bǐ wǒ dà sān suì.", "english": "He is three years older than me.

grammar_points.name: 助动词"可能" (Auxiliary Verb 可能)
grammar_points.explanation: 可能表示估计或可能。可能 indicates estimation or possibility.

examples.chinese: 他可能来。", "pinyin": "Tā kěnéng lái.", "english": "He might come.
明天可能下雨。", "pinyin": "Míngtiān kěnéng xiàyǔ.", "english": "It might rain tomorrow.
这是可能的。", "pinyin": "Zhè shì kěnéng de.", "english": "This is possible.

grammar_points.name: 动词"穿" (Verb 穿)
grammar_points.explanation: 穿表示穿戴衣物。穿 means to wear or put on clothes.

examples.chinese: 我穿这件衣服。", "pinyin": "Wǒ chuān zhè jiàn yīfu.", "english": "I'm wearing this clothes.
他穿着新鞋。", "pinyin": "Tā chuānzhe xīn xié.", "english": "He's wearing new shoes.
今天你穿什么？", "pinyin": "Jīntiān nǐ chuān shénme?", "english": "What are you wearing today?

grammar_points.name: "把"字句(1) (The 把 Sentence (1))
grammar_points.explanation: 把字句把宾语提到动词前，强调对宾语的处置。把 sentence moves the object before the verb, emphasizing the handling of the object.

examples.chinese: 请把门打开。", "pinyin": "Qǐng bǎ mén dǎkāi.", "english": "Please open the door.
我把作业做完了。", "pinyin": "Wǒ bǎ zuòyè zuòwán le.", "english": "I finished my homework.
把书放在桌子上。", "pinyin": "Bǎ shū fàng zài zhuōzi shàng.", "english": "Put the book on the table.

grammar_points.name: 程度补语 (Complement of Degree)
grammar_points.explanation: 程度补语表示动作达到的程度，用得连接。A complement of degree indicates the extent of an action, connected by 得.

examples.chinese: 他说得很好。", "pinyin": "Tā shuō de hěn hǎo.", "english": "He spoke very well.
她跑得很快。", "pinyin": "Tā pǎo de hěn kuài.", "english": "She runs very fast.
我累得睡不着。", "pinyin": "Wǒ lèi de shuì bù zháo.", "english": "I'm so tired I can't sleep.

grammar_points.name: 形容词重叠 (Reduplication of Adjectives)
grammar_points.explanation: 单音节形容词重叠表示程度加深。双音节形容词用AABB形式。Single-syllable adjective reduplication indicates deeper degree. Two-syllable adjectives use AABB form.

examples.chinese: 高高的楼房", "pinyin": "gāogāo de lóufáng", "english": "very tall building
漂漂亮亮的衣服", "pinyin": "piàopiàoliangliang de yīfu", "english": "very beautiful clothes
大大的眼睛", "pinyin": "dàdà de yǎnjing", "english": "big eyes

grammar_points.name: "有点儿"和"一点儿" (有点儿 and 一点儿)
grammar_points.explanation: 有点儿+形容词表示消极意义。形容词+一点儿表示比较或希望。有点儿 + adjective indicates negative meaning. Adjective + 一点儿 indicates comparison or hope.

examples.chinese: 今天有点儿冷。", "pinyin": "Jīntiān yǒudiǎnr lěng.", "english": "Today is a bit cold.
这件衣服有点儿大。", "pinyin": "Zhè jiàn yīfu yǒudiǎnr dà.", "english": "This clothes is a bit too big.
请慢一点儿。", "pinyin": "Qǐng màn yīdiǎnr.", "english": "Please go a bit slower.
我想买便宜一点儿的。", "pinyin": "Wǒ xiǎng mǎi piányi yīdiǎnr de.", "english": "I want to buy a cheaper one.

grammar_points.name: 主谓谓语句 (Subject-Predicate Predicate Sentence)
grammar_points.explanation: 大主语和小主语有领属关系。The large subject and small subject have a possessive relationship.

examples.chinese: 我身体很好。", "pinyin": "Wǒ shēntǐ hěn hǎo.", "english": "My health is very good.
这个房子房间很多。", "pinyin": "Zhège fángzi fángjiān hěn duō.", "english": "This house has many rooms.
他眼睛很大。", "pinyin": "Tā yǎnjing hěn dà.", "english": "His eyes are big.

grammar_points.name: 语气副词"真" (Modal Adverb 真)
grammar_points.explanation: 真表示程度很高，带有感叹语气。真 indicates high degree with an exclamatory tone.

examples.chinese: 这儿的水果真新鲜！", "pinyin": "Zhèr de shuǐguǒ zhēn xīnxiān!", "english": "The fruit here is really fresh!
他真聪明！", "pinyin": "Tā zhēn cōngming!", "english": "He's really smart!
今天真冷！", "pinyin": "Jīntiān zhēn lěng!", "english": "Today is really cold!

grammar_points.name: 动态助词"着" (Aspect Particle 着)
grammar_points.explanation: 着表示动作或状态的持续。着 indicates the continuation of an action or state.

examples.chinese: 门开着。", "pinyin": "Mén kāizhe.", "english": "The door is open.
他站着说话。", "pinyin": "Tā zhànzhe shuōhuà.", "english": "He's standing and talking.
墙上挂着一幅画。", "pinyin": "Qiáng shàng guàzhe yì fú huà.", "english": "A painting hangs on the wall.

grammar_points.name: 存现句 (Existential Sentences)
grammar_points.explanation: 存现句表示某处存在、出现或消失某人/某物。Existential sentences indicate the existence, appearance, or disappearance of someone/something at a location.

examples.chinese: 桌子上有一本书。", "pinyin": "Zhuōzi shàng yǒu yì běn shū.", "english": "There's a book on the table.
门口站着一个人。", "pinyin": "Ménkǒu zhànzhe yí ge rén.", "english": "Someone is standing at the door.
家里来了客人。", "pinyin": "Jiāli lái le kèrén.", "english": "Guests came to the house.

12.title: 我们学习汉语已经两年了

grammar_points.name: 介词"跟"和"和" (Prepositions 跟 and 和)
grammar_points.explanation: 跟和和都可以表示"with"。Both 跟 and 和 can mean 'with'.

examples.chinese: 我和朋友一起去。", "pinyin": "Wǒ hé péngyou yīqǐ qù.", "english": "I'm going with my friend.
你跟谁去？", "pinyin": "Nǐ gēn shéi qù?", "english": "Who are you going with?
我和他都是学生。", "pinyin": "Wǒ hé tā dōu shì xuésheng.", "english": "Both he and I are students.

grammar_points.name: 副词"已经" (Adverb 已经)
grammar_points.explanation: 已经表示动作完成或状态持续了一段时间。已经 indicates an action is completed or a state has continued for some time.

examples.chinese: 我们已经学习两年了。", "pinyin": "Wǒmen yǐjīng xuéxí liǎng nián le.", "english": "We've been studying for two years.
他已经走了。", "pinyin": "Tā yǐjīng zǒu le.", "english": "He has already left.
已经十二点了。", "pinyin": "Yǐjīng shí'èr diǎn le.", "english": "It's already 12 o'clock.

grammar_points.name: 时段表达 (Duration Expressions)
grammar_points.explanation: 时段表示动作持续的时间。在动词后或句末使用。Duration indicates how long an action lasts. It's used after the verb or at the end of a sentence.

examples.chinese: 我学了一个小时。", "pinyin": "Wǒ xué le yí ge xiǎoshí.", "english": "I studied for an hour.
他在北京住了三年。", "pinyin": "Tā zài Běijīng zhù le sān nián.", "english": "He lived in Beijing for three years.
等一会儿。", "pinyin": "Děng yīhuìr.", "english": "Wait a moment.

grammar_points.name: 动词"以为" (Verb 以为)
grammar_points.explanation: 以为表示错误的看法，实际结果与想法不同。以为 indicates a mistaken belief; the actual result differs from what was thought.

examples.chinese: 我以为你在宿舍。", "pinyin": "Wǒ yǐwéi nǐ zài sùshè.", "english": "I thought you were in the dormitory (but you weren't).
我以为他是老师。", "pinyin": "Wǒ yǐwéi tā shì lǎoshī.", "english": "I thought he was a teacher (but he wasn't).
我以为今天不上课。", "pinyin": "Wǒ yǐwéi jīntiān bú shàngkè.", "english": "I thought there was no class today (but there was).

grammar_points.name: "把"字句(2) (The 把 Sentence (2))
grammar_points.explanation: 把字句中，动词后有结果补语或趋向补语。In 把 sentences, the verb is followed by a result or directional complement.

examples.chinese: 我把作业交给了老师。", "pinyin": "Wǒ bǎ zuòyè jiāogěi le lǎoshī.", "english": "I handed in my homework to the teacher.
请把窗户打开。", "pinyin": "Qǐng bǎ chuānghu dǎkāi.", "english": "Please open the window.
我把书拿回来了。", "pinyin": "Wǒ bǎ shū ná huílái le.", "english": "I brought the book back.

grammar_points.name: 趋向补语(1) (Directional Complements (1))
grammar_points.explanation: 趋向补语表示动作的方向，常用有：来、去、上来、下去等。Directional complements indicate the direction of an action. Common ones: 来, 去, 上来, 下去, etc.

examples.chinese: 他进来了。", "pinyin": "Tā jìnlái le.", "english": "He came in.
我跑下去了。", "pinyin": "Wǒ pǎo xiàqù le.", "english": "I ran down.
请站起来。", "pinyin": "Qǐng zhàn qǐlái.", "english": "Please stand up.

grammar_points.name: 助词"的话" (Particle 的话)
grammar_points.explanation: 的话用在从句末，表示假设条件。的话 is used at the end of a clause to indicate a hypothetical condition.

examples.chinese: 如果明天不下雨的话，我去。", "pinyin": "Rúguǒ míngtiān bú xiàyǔ de huà, wǒ qù.", "english": "If it doesn't rain tomorrow, I'll go.
你有时间的话，请来我家。", "pinyin": "Nǐ yǒu shíjiān de huà, qǐng lái wǒ jiā.", "english": "If you have time, please come to my house.
不想去的话，别去。", "pinyin": "Bù xiǎng qù de huà, bié qù.", "english": "If you don't want to go, don't go.

grammar_points.name: 趋向补语(2) (Directional Complements (2))
grammar_points.explanation: 复合趋向补语：上来、下去、进来、出去等。Compound directional complements: 上来, 下去, 进来, 出去, etc.

examples.chinese: 他跑上来了。", "pinyin": "Tā pǎo shànglái le.", "english": "He ran up.
请把书拿出去。", "pinyin": "Qǐng bǎ shū ná chūqù.", "english": "Please take the book out.
我想走进去看看。", "pinyin": "Wǒ xiǎng zǒu jìnlái kànkan.", "english": "I want to walk in and take a look.

grammar_points.name: 程度补语"极"了 (Degree Complement 极了)
grammar_points.explanation: 极了表示程度非常高，带有感叹语气。极了 indicates very high degree with an exclamatory tone.

examples.chinese: 好看极了！", "pinyin": "Hǎokàn jí le!", "english": "Extremely good-looking!
高兴极了！", "pinyin": "Gāoxìng jí le!", "english": "Extremely happy!
累极了！", "pinyin": "Lèi jí le!", "english": "Extremely tired!

grammar_points.name: 量词"条" (Measure Word 条)
grammar_points.explanation: 条用于长条形物体或裤子、裙子等。条 is used for long, narrow objects or pants, skirts, etc.

examples.chinese: 一条裙子", "pinyin": "yì tiáo qúnzi", "english": "a skirt
一条裤子", "pinyin": "yì tiáo kùzi", "english": "a pair of pants
一条河", "pinyin": "yì tiáo hé", "english": "a river
一条鱼", "pinyin": "yì tiáo yú", "english": "a fish

grammar_points.name: 结果补语"好" (Result Complement 好)
grammar_points.explanation: 好作结果补语，表示动作完成并达到满意程度。好 as a result complement indicates the action is completed satisfactorily.

examples.chinese: 饭做好了。", "pinyin": "Fàn zuòhǎo le.", "english": "The food is ready.
作业写好了。", "pinyin": "Zuòyè xiěhǎo le.", "english": "The homework is written.
准备好了吗？", "pinyin": "Zhǔnbèi hǎo le ma?", "english": "Are you ready?

grammar_points.name: 介词"向" (Preposition 向)
grammar_points.explanation: 向表示动作的方向或对象。向 indicates the direction or target of an action.

examples.chinese: 向南走。", "pinyin": "Xiàng nán zǒu.", "english": "Walk south.
向我学习。", "pinyin": "Xiàng wǒ xuéxí.", "english": "Learn from me.
向前看。", "pinyin": "Xiàng qián kàn.", "english": "Look forward.
